memberdef.argsstring: (const Domaine_dis_base &zd, const Domaine_Cl_dis_base &zcd, const Champ_Inc_base &ch) override
memberdef.name: associer

briefdescription.para: Associe l'operateur au domaine_dis, le domaine_Cl_dis, et a l'inconnue de son equation.
Donne des informations sur le type de l'Objet_U.

simplesect.para: (const Type_info*) structure regroupant les informations sur le type de l'Objet_U

briefdescription.para: DOES NOTHING - to override in derived classes.

detaileddescription.para: Imprime l'operateur sur un flot de sortie.

briefdescription.para: DOES NOTHING - to override in derived classes.

detaileddescription.para: Lit un operateur sur un flot d'entree.

briefdescription.para: Represents the diffusion operator for a multi-component field with matrix diffusivity using VDF discretization.

detaileddescription.para: The diffusivity field is a NxN matrix, where N is the number of components. The associated iterator is of type Iterateur_VDF_Elem, and the associated evaluator is of type Eval_Diff_VDF_Multi_inco_Multi_scalar_Elem.
